overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the protagonist paragliding down through a snowy mountain range at night. The character descends from high altitude through falling snow, passes rocky cliff faces, and lands on a snow-covered ridge before continuing on foot.

agents.ego_description: paragliding steadily downward through light snowfall high above the mountain terrain

entered.detail: dark night sky filled with visible stars and light snowfall
expansive snow-covered peaks and valleys visible far below
red and white striped paraglider canopy held above the character
dark patches of trees visible on distant mountain slopes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-altitude nighttime descent through a snowy mountain range. The character paraglides steadily downward with a red and white canopy, surrounded by falling snow against a starry sky. Distant snow-covered peaks and forest patches are visible far below in the cool blue darkness.

events.description: approaching and passing close to a large rocky cliff face on the right side

agents.ego_description: gliding past rocky outcrops while maintaining steady descent trajectory

entered.detail: steep dark rock face with snow patches passing by on the right

segments.scene_description: The character continues descending but now passes close to a steep rocky cliff face on the right. The terrain below becomes more detailed and closer as the altitude drops. The starry sky remains partially visible while the paraglider maintains a steady glide path alongside the mountain terrain.

events.description: slowing descent rate in preparation for landing on the snow-covered ridge
landing on the snow and putting away the paraglider, transitioning to running

agents.ego_description: landing softly on the snow-covered ridge, stowing the paraglider, and beginning to run along the mountain top

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain ridge approaching for landing
dark rocks scattered across the snow surface

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to landing on a narrow snow-covered mountain ridge. The character slows the descent, touches down softly on the snow, and immediately stows the paraglider. The camera follows as the character begins running along the ridge top, with rocky cliff walls now visible to the left and scattered rocks on the snow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent from a high-altitude nighttime sky down to a rugged, snow-covered mountain ridge. It begins with a steady glide through falling snow under a starry sky, with distant peaks and forests appearing as small patches in the cool blue darkness far below. As the character descends, the camera moves closer to the terrain, passing alongside a steep, rocky cliff face that brings the mountain's texture into sharp focus. The scene then shifts toward a narrow ridge as the character slows their glide and touches down softly on the frozen ground. Finally, the paraglider is stowed away as the camera follows the character running along the ridge top between rocky walls and scattered stones.
